<div id="bodyContent" class="vector-body" aria-labelledby="firstHeading" data-mw-ve-target-container>
<div class="vector-body-before-content">
<div class="mw-indicators">
<div id="mw-indicator-pp-default" class="mw-indicator"><div class="mw-parser-output"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Wikipedia:Protection_policy#semi" title="This article is semi-protected."><img alt="Page semi-protected" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/1/1b/Semi-protection-shackle.svg/20px-Semi-protection-shackle.svg.png" decoding="async" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/1/1b/Semi-protection-shackle.svg/40px-Semi-protection-shackle.svg.png 2x" data-file-width="512" data-file-height="512" /></a></span></div></div>
</div>

<div id="siteSub" class="noprint">From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia</div>
</div>
<div id="contentSub"><div id="mw-content-subtitle"></div></div>
<div id="mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"><div class="mw-subjectpageheader">
</div><div class="mw-content-ltr mw-parser-output" lang="en" dir="ltr"><p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p>
<style data-mw-deduplicate="TemplateStyles:r1320445320">.mw-parser-output .hatnote{font-style:italic}.mw-parser-output div.hatnote{padding-left:1.6em;margin-bottom:0.5em}.mw-parser-output .hatnote i{font-style:normal}.mw-parser-output .hatnote+link+.hatnote{margin-top:-0.5em}@media print{body.ns-0 .mw-parser-output .hatnote{display:none!important}}</style><div role="note" class="hatnote navigation-not-searchable">For countries by GDP based on purchasing power parity, see <a href="/wiki/List_of_countries_by_GDP_(PPP)" title="List of countries by GDP (PPP)">List of countries by GDP (PPP)</a>.</div>
<link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r1320445320" /><div role="note" class="hatnote navigation-not-searchable">For countries by GDP per capita, see <a href="/wiki/List_of_countries_by_GDP_(nominal)_per_capita" title="List of countries by GDP (nominal) per capita">List of countries by GDP (nominal) per capita</a>.</div>
<link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r1320445320" /><div role="note" class="hatnote navigation-not-searchable">For figures including informal economies, see <a href="/wiki/List_of_countries_by_informal_GDP_(nominal)" title="List of countries by informal GDP (nominal)">List of countries by informal GDP (nominal)</a>.</div>
<p class="mw-empty-elt">

</p>
<table border="0" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" style="float:right;">

<tbody><tr>
<td><div class="timeline-wrapper"><map name="timeline_3rstf1qejcsb9m2ikofjtbn43vh94ct"></map><img usemap="#timeline_3rstf1qejcsb9m2ikofjtbn43vh94ct" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/timeline/3rstf1qejcsb9m2ikofjtbn43vh94ct.png" /></div>
</td></tr>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:center; font-size:90%;">Largest economies in the world by nominal GDP in 2026<br />according to <a href="/wiki/International_Monetary_Fund" title="International Monetary Fund">International Monetary Fund</a> projections<sup id="cite&#95;ref-China-THM&#95;1-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-China-THM-1"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>n 1<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup><sup id="cite&#95;ref-IMFOCT2025&#95;2-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-IMFOCT2025-2"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>1<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup>
</td></tr></tbody></table>
<figure typeof="mw:File/Thumb"><a href="/wiki/File:Countries_by_GDP_(nominal).svg" class="mw-file-description"><img src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/62/Countries_by_GDP_%28nominal%29.svg/500px-Countries_by_GDP_%28nominal%29.svg.png" decoding="async" width="425" height="216" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/62/Countries_by_GDP_%28nominal%29.svg/960px-Countries_by_GDP_%28nominal%29.svg.png 2x" data-file-width="2754" data-file-height="1398" /></a><figcaption>Countries by nominal GDP projected for 2025:<sup id="cite&#95;ref-3" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-3"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>n 2<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> <table width="100%"> <tbody><tr> <td style="vertical-align:top;"> <style data-mw-deduplicate="TemplateStyles:r981673959">.mw-parser-output .legend{page-break-inside:avoid;break-inside:avoid-column}.mw-parser-output .legend-color{display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;height:1.25em;line-height:1.25;margin:1px 0;text-align:center;border:1px solid black;background-color:transparent;color:black}.mw-parser-output .legend-text{}</style><div class="legend"><span class="legend-color mw-no-invert" style="background-color:#000203; color:white;-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact;">&#160;</span>&#160;&gt; $20 trillion</div> <link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r981673959" /><div class="legend"><span class="legend-color mw-no-invert" style="background-color:#00223a; color:white;-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact;">&#160;</span>&#160;$10–20 trillion</div> <link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r981673959" /><div class="legend"><span class="legend-color mw-no-invert" style="background-color:#003b63; color:white;-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact;">&#160;</span>&#160;$5–10 trillion</div> <link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r981673959" /><div class="legend"><span class="legend-color mw-no-invert" style="background-color:#004e83; color:white;-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact;">&#160;</span>&#160;$1–5 trillion</div> <link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r981673959" /><div class="legend"><span class="legend-color mw-no-invert" style="background-color:#005e9c; color:white;-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact;">&#160;</span>&#160;$750 billion – $1 trillion</div> <link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r981673959" /><div class="legend"><span class="legend-color mw-no-invert" style="background-color:#0071bd; color:white;-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact;">&#160;</span>&#160;$500–750 billion</div> </td> <td style="vertical-align:top;"> <link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r981673959" /><div class="legend"><span class="legend-color mw-no-invert" style="background-color:#0088e5; color:black;-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact;">&#160;</span>&#160;$250–500 billion</div> <link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r981673959" /><div class="legend"><span class="legend-color mw-no-invert" style="background-color:#109eff; color:black;-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact;">&#160;</span>&#160;$100–250 billion</div> <link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r981673959" /><div class="legend"><span class="legend-color mw-no-invert" style="background-color:#47b4ff; color:black;-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact;">&#160;</span>&#160;$50–100 billion</div> <link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r981673959" /><div class="legend"><span class="legend-color mw-no-invert" style="background-color:#74c6ff; color:black;-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact;">&#160;</span>&#160;$25–50 billion</div> <link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r981673959" /><div class="legend"><span class="legend-color mw-no-invert" style="background-color:#9dd7ff; color:black;-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact;">&#160;</span>&#160;$5–25 billion</div> <link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r981673959" /><div class="legend"><span class="legend-color mw-no-invert" style="background-color:#ceebff; color:black;-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact;">&#160;</span>&#160;&lt; $5 billion</div> </td></tr></tbody></table> </figcaption></figure>
<p><a href="/wiki/Gross_domestic_product" title="Gross domestic product">Gross domestic product</a> (GDP) is the <a href="/wiki/Market_value" title="Market value">market value</a> of all final goods and services from a nation in a given year.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-4" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-4"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>2<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> Countries are sorted by nominal GDP estimates from financial and statistical institutions, which are calculated at market or government official <a href="/wiki/Exchange_rate" title="Exchange rate">exchange rates</a>. Nominal GDP does not take into account differences in the <a href="/wiki/Cost_of_living" title="Cost of living">cost of living</a> in different countries, and the results can vary greatly from one year to another based on fluctuations in the exchange rates of the country's <a href="/wiki/Currency" title="Currency">currency</a>.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-5" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-5"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>3<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> Such fluctuations may change a country's ranking from one year to the next, even though they often make little or no difference in the standard of living of its population.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-6" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-6"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>4<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup>
</p><p>Comparisons of national wealth are also frequently made based on <a href="/wiki/Purchasing_power_parity" title="Purchasing power parity">purchasing power parity</a> (PPP), to adjust for differences in the cost of living in different countries. Other metrics, <a href="/wiki/List_of_countries_by_GDP_(nominal)_per_capita" title="List of countries by GDP (nominal) per capita">nominal GDP per capita</a> and a corresponding <a href="/wiki/List_of_countries_by_GDP_(PPP)_per_capita" title="List of countries by GDP (PPP) per capita">GDP (PPP) per capita</a>, are used for comparing national <a href="/wiki/Standard_of_living" title="Standard of living">standard of living</a>. On the whole, PPP per capita figures are less spread than nominal GDP per capita figures.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-7" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-7"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>5<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup>
</p><p>The rankings of national economies have changed significantly over time. For instance, the United States overtook the British Empire around 1916; Japan rose rapidly in the post-World War II period to become the world’s second-largest economy by the 1970s; China moved from ninth place in 1978 to second in 2010 following market reforms. These shifts reflect long-term changes in global economic output.
</p><p>The first list includes estimates compiled by the <a href="/wiki/International_Monetary_Fund" title="International Monetary Fund">International Monetary Fund</a>'s World Economic Outlook, the second list shows the <a href="/wiki/World_Bank" class="mw-redirect" title="World Bank">World Bank</a>'s data, and the third list includes data compiled by the <a href="/wiki/United_Nations_Statistics_Division" title="United Nations Statistics Division">United Nations Statistics Division</a>. The IMF's definitive data for the past year and estimates for the current year are published twice a year in April and October. Non-sovereign entities (the world, continents, and some <a href="/wiki/Dependent_territory" title="Dependent territory">dependent territories</a>) and states with limited international recognition (such as <a href="/wiki/Kosovo" title="Kosovo">Kosovo</a> and <a href="/wiki/Taiwan" title="Taiwan">Taiwan</a>) are included in the list where they appear in the sources.
</p>
<meta property="mw:PageProp/toc" />
<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="Table">Table</h2></div>
<p><i>The table initially ranks each IMF member including <link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r981673959" /><span class="legend-color mw-no-invert" style="forced-color-adjust:none; background-color:#ECECEC; color:black;">&#160;<a href="/wiki/List_of_sovereign_states" title="List of sovereign states">sovereign states</a> not part of the IMF, <a href="/wiki/Lists_of_non-sovereign_nations" title="Lists of non-sovereign nations">non-sovereign nations</a> and territories, and <a href="/wiki/List_of_states_with_limited_recognition" title="List of states with limited recognition">countries with limited recognition</a>&#160;</span></i>
</p>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="Nominal_GDP_of_regional_groupings">Nominal GDP of regional groupings</h2></div>
<p>In addition to the national GDP values stated in the previous section, the IMF and World Bank statistics include GDP estmates for various regional grouping and trade blocks. The table below provides a list of these groupings, including the 13 IMF regions and, where available, the equivalent value from World Bank sources.
</p>
<link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r1305414688" /><link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r1349610755" />
<table class="wikitable sortable sticky-header-multi static-row-numbers" style="text-align:right">
<caption>GDP forecast or estimate (million US$) by region or grouping
</caption>
<tbody><tr class="static-row-header" style="text-align:center;">
<th>Regional groupings
</th>
<th style="width:7.5em;"><a href="/wiki/International_Monetary_Fund" title="International Monetary Fund">IMF</a><br />(2026)<sup id="cite&#95;ref-IMFOCT2025&#95;2-2" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-IMFOCT2025-2"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>1<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup>
</th>
<th style="width:7.5em;"><a href="/wiki/World_Bank" class="mw-redirect" title="World Bank">World Bank</a><br />(2024)<sup id="cite&#95;ref-20" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-20"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>8<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup>
</th></tr>
<tr class="static-row-header" style="font-weight:bold;">
<td style="text-align:left"><span class="flagicon" style="padding-left:25px;">&#160;</span>World</td>
<td>126,295,331</td>

<tr>

<td>73,813,712</td>
<td>71,321,000 <sup id="cite&#95;ref-wbhi&#95;22-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-wbhi-22"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>r 2<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup>
</td></tr>
<tr>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="See_also">See also</h2></div>
<style data-mw-deduplicate="TemplateStyles:r1266661725">.mw-parser-output .portalbox{padding:0;margin:0.5em 0;display:table;box-sizing:border-box;max-width:175px;list-style:none}.mw-parser-output .portalborder{border:1px solid var(--border-color-base,#a2a9b1);padding:0.1em;background:var(--background-color-neutral-subtle,#f8f9fa)}.mw-parser-output .portalbox-entry{display:table-row;font-size:85%;line-height:110%;height:1.9em;font-style:italic;font-weight:bold}.mw-parser-output .portalbox-image{display:table-cell;padding:0.2em;vertical-align:middle;text-align:center}.mw-parser-output .portalbox-link{display:table-cell;padding:0.2em 0.2em 0.2em 0.3em;vertical-align:middle}@media(min-width:720px){.mw-parser-output .portalleft{margin:0.5em 1em 0.5em 0}.mw-parser-output .portalright{clear:right;float:right;margin:0.5em 0 0.5em 1em}}</style><ul role="navigation" aria-label="Portals" class="noprint portalbox portalborder portalright">
<li class="portalbox-entry"><span class="portalbox-image"><span class="noviewer" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/File:Emblem-money.svg" class="mw-file-description"><img alt="icon" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/f3/Emblem-money.svg/40px-Emblem-money.svg.png" decoding="async" width="28" height="28" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/f3/Emblem-money.svg/60px-Emblem-money.svg.png 2x" data-file-width="48" data-file-height="48" /></a></span></span><span class="portalbox-link"><a href="/wiki/Portal:Business_and_economics" class="mw-redirect" title="Portal:Business and economics">Business and economics portal</a></span></li><li class="portalbox-entry"><span class="portalbox-image"><span class="skin-invert-image noviewer" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/File:Liste.svg" class="mw-file-description"><img alt="icon" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1d/Liste.svg/40px-Liste.svg.png" decoding="async" width="28" height="28" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1d/Liste.svg/60px-Liste.svg.png 2x" data-file-width="40" data-file-height="40" /></a></span></span><span class="portalbox-link"><a href="/wiki/Portal:Contents/Lists" class="mw-redirect" title="Portal:Contents/Lists">Contents/Lists portal</a></span></li></ul><p><b>By country:</b>
</p><ul><li><a href="/wiki/List_of_countries_by_GDP_(PPP)" title="List of countries by GDP (PPP)">List of countries by GDP (PPP)</a></li></ul>

<li><a href="/wiki/List_of_countries_by_GDP_(PPP)_per_capita" title="List of countries by GDP (PPP) per capita">List of countries by GDP (PPP) per capita</a></li></ul>

<li><a href="/wiki/List_of_countries_by_real_GDP_per_capita_growth" title="List of countries by real GDP per capita growth">List of countries by real GDP per capita growth</a></li></ul>
<ul><li><a href="/wiki/List_of_countries_by_past_and_projected_GDP_(nominal)" title="List of countries by past and projected GDP (nominal)">List of countries by past and projected GDP (nominal)</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/List_of_countries_by_past_and_projected_GDP_(PPP)" title="List of countries by past and projected GDP (PPP)">List of countries by past and projected GDP (PPP)</a></li></ul>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="Notes">Notes</h2></div>
<style data-mw-deduplicate="TemplateStyles:r1327269900">.mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-2{column-width:30em}.mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-3{column-width:25em}body.skin-vector-2022 .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-2{column-width:27em}body.skin-vector-2022 .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-3{column-width:22.5em}.mw-parser-output .references[data-mw-group=upper-alpha]{list-style-type:upper-alpha}.mw-parser-output .references[data-mw-group=upper-roman]{list-style-type:upper-roman}.mw-parser-output .references[data-mw-group=lower-alpha]{list-style-type:lower-alpha}.mw-parser-output .references[data-mw-group=lower-greek]{list-style-type:lower-greek}.mw-parser-output .references[data-mw-group=lower-roman]{list-style-type:lower-roman}.mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-upper-alpha .references{list-style-type:upper-alpha}.mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-upper-roman .references{list-style-type:upper-roman}.mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-lower-alpha .references{list-style-type:lower-alpha}.mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-lower-greek .references{list-style-type:lower-greek}.mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-lower-roman .references{list-style-type:lower-roman}</style><div>
<div class="mw-references-wrap mw-references-columns"><ol class="references" data-mw-group="n">
<li id="cite&#95;note-China-THM-1"><span class="mw-cite-backlink">^ <a href="#cite_ref-China-THM_1-0"><sup><i><b>a</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-China-THM_1-1"><sup><i><b>b</b></i></sup></a></span> <span class="reference-text">Figures for China exclude <a href="/wiki/Taiwan" title="Taiwan">Taiwan</a>, and the <a href="/wiki/Special_administrative_regions_of_China" title="Special administrative regions of China">special administrative regions</a> of <a href="/wiki/Hong_Kong" title="Hong Kong">Hong Kong</a> and <a href="/wiki/Macau" title="Macau">Macau</a>.</span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-3"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-3">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Based on the best available GDP figure for each country at the time of creation (16 June 2024). Best available GDP figure was defined as the latest available figure from the <a href="/wiki/International_Monetary_Fund" title="International Monetary Fund">International Monetary Fund</a> (including forecasts for the current year), otherwise the latest available figure from the <a href="/wiki/World_Bank" class="mw-redirect" title="World Bank">World Bank</a>, otherwise the latest available figure from the <a href="/wiki/United_Nations_Statistics_Division" title="United Nations Statistics Division">United Nations Statistics Division</a>; however, countries that didn't have any figure for a year more recent than 2019 were not included at all. For almost all countries, the latest IMF forecast figure for 2024 was used.</span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-Taiwan&#95;China-10"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-Taiwan_China_10-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">The name used in the IMF report is "Taiwan Province of China".</span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-HongKong&#95;China-11"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-HongKong_China_11-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">The name used in the IMF report is "Hong Kong SAR".</span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-Ukraine-12"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-Ukraine_12-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Figures exclude the <a href="/wiki/Autonomous_Republic_of_Crimea" title="Autonomous Republic of Crimea">Autonomous Republic of Crimea</a> and <a href="/wiki/Sevastopol" title="Sevastopol">Sevastopol</a>.</span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-Tanzania-13"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-Tanzania_13-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">The UN figure excludes the autonomous region of <a href="/wiki/Zanzibar" title="Zanzibar">Zanzibar</a>.</span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-Macau&#95;China-14"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-Macau_China_14-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">The name used in the IMF report is "Macao SAR".</span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-Cyprus-15"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-Cyprus_15-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Data are for the area controlled by the Government of the Republic of Cyprus.</span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-Georgia-16"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-Georgia_16-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Excludes <a href="/wiki/Abkhazia" title="Abkhazia">Abkhazia</a> and <a href="/wiki/South_Ossetia" title="South Ossetia">South Ossetia</a></span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-Moldova-17"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-Moldova_17-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Excludes data for <a href="/wiki/Transnistria" title="Transnistria">Transnistria</a></span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-WBG-18"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-WBG_18-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">The name used in the IMF and World Bank reports is "West Bank and Gaza".</span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-Palestine-19"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-Palestine_19-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">The name used by the UN is "State of Palestine".</span>
</li>
</ol></div></div>
<link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r1327269900" /><div>
<div class="mw-references-wrap"><ol class="references" data-mw-group="r">
<li id="cite&#95;note-aehi-21"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-aehi_21-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">The IMF category for Advanced Economies includes the following states: <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Andorra" title="Economy of Andorra">Andorra</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Australia" title="Economy of Australia">Australia</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Austria" title="Economy of Austria">Austria</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Belgium" title="Economy of Belgium">Belgium</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Canada" title="Economy of Canada">Canada</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Croatia" title="Economy of Croatia">Croatia</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Cyprus" title="Economy of Cyprus">Cyprus</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_the_Czech_Republic" title="Economy of the Czech Republic">Czech Republic</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Denmark" title="Economy of Denmark">Denmark</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Estonia" title="Economy of Estonia">Estonia</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Finland" title="Economy of Finland">Finland</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_France" title="Economy of France">France</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Germany" title="Economy of Germany">Germany</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Greece" title="Economy of Greece">Greece</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Hong_Kong" title="Economy of Hong Kong">Hong Kong SAR</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Iceland" title="Economy of Iceland">Iceland</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_the_Republic_of_Ireland" title="Economy of the Republic of Ireland">Ireland</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Israel" title="Economy of Israel">Israel</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Italy" title="Economy of Italy">Italy</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Japan" title="Economy of Japan">Japan</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_South_Korea" title="Economy of South Korea">Korea</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Latvia" title="Economy of Latvia">Latvia</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Lithuania" title="Economy of Lithuania">Lithuania</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Luxembourg" title="Economy of Luxembourg">Luxembourg</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Macau" title="Economy of Macau">Macao SAR</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Malta" title="Economy of Malta">Malta</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_the_Netherlands" title="Economy of the Netherlands">The Netherlands</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_New_Zealand" title="Economy of New href="/wiki/Economy_of_Trinidad_and_Tobago" title="Economy of Trinidad and Tobago">Trinidad and Tobago</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Tunisia" title="Economy of Tunisia">Tunisia</a>, <a </li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-eda-25"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-eda_25-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">The IMF definition for Emerging and Developing Asia includes <li id="cite&#95;note-eap-26"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-eap_26-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">The World Bank category of 'East Asia and Pacific (excluding high income)' includes: <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Cambodia" title="Economy of Cambodia">Cambodia</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_China" title="Economy of China">China</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Fiji" title="Economy of Fiji">Fiji</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Indonesia" title="Economy of Indonesia">Indonesia</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Kiribati" title="Economy of Kiribati">Kiribati</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_North_Korea" title="Economy of North Korea">Korea, Dem. <li id="cite&#95;note-oae-27"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-oae_27-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">The IMF category for Other Advanced Economies includes these states: <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Andorra" title="Economy of Andorra">Andorra</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Australia" title="Economy of Australia">Australia</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_the_Czech_Republic" title="Economy of the Czech Republic">Czech Republic</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Denmark" title="Economy of Denmark">Denmark</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Hong_Kong" title="Economy of Hong Kong">Hong Kong SAR</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Iceland" title="Economy of Iceland">Iceland</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Israel" title="Economy of Israel">Israel</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_South_Korea" title="Economy of South Korea">Korea</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Macau" title="Economy of Macau">Macao SAR</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_New_Zealand" title="Economy of New Zealand">New Zealand</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Norway" title="Economy of Norway">Norway</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Puerto_Rico" title="Economy of Puerto Rico">Puerto Rico</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_San_Marino" title="Economy of San Marino">San Marino</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Singapore" title="Economy of Singapore">Singapore</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Sweden" title="Economy of Sweden">Sweden</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Switzerland" title="Economy of Switzerland">Switzerland</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Taiwan" title="Economy of Taiwan">Taiwan Province of China</a></span>

<li id="cite&#95;note-ede-28"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-ede_28-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">The IMF category for Emerging and Developing Europe includes these states: <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Albania" title="Economy of Albania">Albania</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Belarus" title="Economy of Belarus">Belarus</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Bosnia_and_Herzegovina" title="Economy of Bosnia and Herzegovina">Bosnia and Herzegovina</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Bulgaria" title="Economy of Bulgaria">Bulgaria</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Hungary" title="Economy of Hungary">Hungary</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Kosovo" title="Economy of Kosovo">Kosovo</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Moldova" title="Economy of Moldova">Moldova</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Montenegro" title="Economy of Montenegro">Montenegro</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_North_Macedonia" title="Economy of North Macedonia">North Macedonia</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Poland" title="Economy of Poland">Poland</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Romania" title="Economy of Romania">Romania</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Russia" title="Economy of Russia">Russia</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Serbia" title="Economy of Serbia">Serbia</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Turkey" title="Economy of Turkey">Türkiye</a>, <a href="/wiki/Economy_of_Ukraine" title="Economy of Ukraine">Ukraine</a></span>

Retrieved <span class="nowrap">23 May</span> 2016</span>.</cite><span title="ctx&#95;ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft&#95;val&#95;fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Changes+in+Exchange+Rates+in+Rapidly+Development+Countries%3A+Theory%2C+Practice%2C+and+Policy+Issues&amp;rft.atitle=Economic+Growth+and+Real+Exchange+Rate%3A+An+Overview+of+the+Balassa-Samuelson+Hypothesis+in+Asia&amp;rft.date=1999-01&amp;rft.au=Ito%2C+Takatoshi&amp;rft.au=Isard%2C+Peter&amp;rft.au=Symansky%2C+Steven&amp;rft&#95;id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.nber.org%2Fchapters%2Fc8616.pdf&amp;rfr&#95;id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+countries+by+GDP+%28nominal%29" class="Z3988"></span></span>
</li>

</div></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" class="navbox-group" style="width:1%">Income and taxes</th><td class="navbox-list-with-group navbox-list navbox-odd hlist" style="width:100%;padding:0"><div style="padding:0 0.25em">
